name: Daiun Co.,Ltd.
summary: Daiun Co.,Ltd. operates as a cargo handling company in Japan and internationally. It offers sea freight handling and forwarding services; and seaborne forwarding, harbor transport, trucking, road transport, warehousing, customs brokerage, air freight handling, travel interceding, proxy for shippers, accident insurance handling, automobiles damages, and other related services. The company was formerly known as Osaka Shipping Co., Ltd. and changed its name to Daiun Co.,Ltd. in January 1962. Daiun Co.,Ltd. was incorporated in 1945 and is headquartered in Osaka, Japan.
